---
title: "Lab News"
author: ""
listing: 
  contents:
    - "blog/*.qmd"
  type: default
  fields: [title, categories, date, image, reading-time]
  sort: "date desc"
  image-height: "100%"
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        /* Target the listing grid card/thumbnail images dynamically */
        .quarto-listing-container-default .thumbnail img,
        .listing-item .thumbnail img {
          height: 150px !important;       /* Forces the strict uniform height */
          width: 100% !important;         /* Spans full width of the container slot */
          object-fit: contain !important; /* Fits image perfectly without distortion */
          background-color: #ffffff;      /* Fills remaining spaces with solid white */
          object-position: center;        /* Centers the image within the white space */
        }
        </style>
---
---
